tasks.label: Clean: Desktop
tasks.detail: Wipes the desktop build directory and rebuilds from scratch

tasks.label: Clean: Android arm64
tasks.detail: Wipes the arm64 build directory and rebuilds from scratch

tasks.label: Clean: Android x86_64
tasks.detail: Wipes the x86_64 build directory and rebuilds from scratch

tasks.label: ADB: install arm64
tasks.detail: Install the arm64 APK on a connected device via ADB (-r allows reinstall)

tasks.label: ADB: install x86_64
tasks.detail: Install the x86_64 APK on a connected emulator via ADB

tasks.label: Package: DEB
tasks.detail: Builds the Debian package; output .deb lands in the parent directory

tasks.label: Package: APK arm64
args: cmake --preset android-arm64-local && cmake --build --preset android-arm64-local && cp build-android-arm64/android-build/InfiniTTT_QML.apk InfiniTTT-arm64.apk && echo 'APK ready: InfiniTTT-arm64.apk'
tasks.detail: Configures, builds, and copies the arm64 APK to the project root

tasks.label: Package: APK x86_64
args: cmake --preset android-x86_64-local && cmake --build --preset android-x86_64-local && cp build-android-x86_64/android-build/InfiniTTT_QML.apk InfiniTTT-x86_64.apk && echo 'APK ready: InfiniTTT-x86_64.apk'
tasks.detail: Configures, builds, and copies the x86_64 APK to the project root (emulator)
